## What simulation are you proposing?

<!-- Describe the interactive demo or scenario you want to see built -->

## Which module or lesson would it support?

<!-- e.g. Module 25 — Phishing, Smishing & Vishing -->

## What should the user experience?

<!-- Describe what the user would see, click on, or interact with step by step -->

## What is the learning outcome?

<!-- What should someone understand or be able to do after completing this simulation? -->

## Can you build it, or are you requesting it?

- [ ] I can build it — I will submit a pull request
- [ ] I am requesting it for someone else to build
